title: Marketplace Manager - Goibibo - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Goibibo - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Join the Goibibo family as a Marketplace Manager in Nagpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Goibibo:
Goibibo is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Magento

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Goibibo!
